name: Quick Broccoli & Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Pkg Frozen Broccoli with Cheese Sauce
1 cup Cooked Chicken, Ham or Turkey, Cubed
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: Cooking times are based on the use of a 625-750 watt microwave oven and food quantities for 2 servings. Adjust cooking times as required.
Follow package directions for frozen Broccoli with Cheese Sauce.
Combine all ingredients in a (1 quart) casserole dish.
Cover.
Microwave on high until the rice is tender (about 6 minutes), stirring once.
Serve
